zh.Rydal, Westmoreland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德達爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Lancaster於1400年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親John Lancaster11397歲，母親Lady Margaret Threlkeld20歲。她於1420年之前與Sir Thomas Fleming結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國。

zh-hans.Rydal, Westmoreland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德達爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Lancaster于1400年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲John Lancaster11397岁，母亲Lady Margaret Threlkeld20岁。她于1420年之前与Sir Thomas Fleming结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Lancaster was born in 1400, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, John Lancaster, was 11397 and her mother, Lady Margaret Threlkeld, was 20. She married Sir Thomas Fleming before 1420. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Lancaster est née en 1400, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Lancaster, avait 11397 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Threlkeld, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Fleming avant 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Lancaster 1400 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Lancaster 11397 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Threlkeld 20. Sie hat vor 1420 Sir Thomas Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Lancaster è nata il nel 1400 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, John Lancaster, aveva 11397 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Threlkeld, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Fleming prima del 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel England.

ja.Rydal, Westmoreland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドリダル

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Lancasterが1400年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Lancasterは11397歳，母Lady Margaret Threlkeldは20歳であった。1420年以前にSir Thomas Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Lancaster(이)가 1400년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Lancaster(은)는 11397세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Threlkeld(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1420년 이전 Sir Thomas Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Lancaster nasceu em 1400, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lancaster, tinha 11397 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Threlkeld, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Fleming antes 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Lancaster родилась в 1400 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Lancaster было 11397 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Threlkeld, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Fleming перед 1420 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Lancaster nació en 1400, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lancaster, tenía 11397 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Threlkeld, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Fleming antes de 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en Inglaterra.
